dropHint1: You bring the video. We bring the words — extraction to translation, in one flow.
dropHint2: MP4 · AVI · MKV · MOV · WMV · WEBM · SRT
clearCompletedBtnTitle: Remove only completed items from the queue
reduceRepetitionDesc: Stops Whisper from repeating the same line or inventing text over silent/music/sound-effect parts by transcribing speech segments only. Recommended for most videos. If quiet speech gets cut and subtitles go missing, turn this off or use the large-v3 model.
removeSpeakerTagsDesc: Removes the leading '>>' markers Whisper adds when the speaker changes. The dialogue text itself is kept.
removeSDHDesc: Deletes sound-description lines like [music], (applause), ♪. Only removes a cue when the whole line is a sound description — parentheses inside real dialogue are left untouched.
autoRetryDesc: When the queue finishes, failed files are retried automatically (up to 2 times). Useful when leaving long jobs unattended.
emptyQueueHint:
Drop a video or SRT file
onto the dropzone on the left
langStatusInfo:
Recommended: Auto-detect language per file
Fixed: Use the same language for all files
cannotRemoveProcessing: Cannot remove file currently being processed.
stopRequested: Stop requested. Will stop after current file completes.
myMemoryQuotaExceeded: MyMemory daily quota exceeded. Try again tomorrow or use DeepL/OpenAI.
errorGpuMemory: GPU memory shortage or driver issue
errorWhisperFailed: Whisper processing failed (file format or audio issue)
errorDllEntryPointNotFound: DLL entry point not found (0xC0000139). CUDA DLLs are incompatible with your GPU driver. Download whisper-bin-x64.zip from GitHub and place it in the whisper-cpp/cpu/ folder.
errorDllCpuAvailable: DLL entry point not found (0xC0000139). CUDA DLLs are incompatible with your GPU driver. CPU build is already installed - please change device to CPU in settings.
errorDllNotFound: Required DLL not found (0xC0000135). Install Visual C++ Redistributable 2015-2022 or use CPU-only build.
errorSrtPathMissing: SRT file path missing after extraction
errorApiQuotaExceeded: API quota exceeded - please wait and retry, or use a different translation engine
histEmptyHint: Process a file and it will appear here

modelDescriptions.hy-mt-1.8b: Fast, lightweight local translator. Runs well on RTX 2060.
modelDescriptions.hy-mt-7b: High-quality local translator. Auto-downloads on first use.
modelDescriptions.whisper-tiny: Smallest and fastest. Runs on CPU. Lower accuracy.
modelDescriptions.whisper-base: More accurate than Tiny. For general voice subtitles.
modelDescriptions.whisper-small: Fast subtitle extraction. Good for daily use.
modelDescriptions.whisper-large-v3-turbo: Large accuracy + 8x speed. Recommended for high-end GPUs.
modelDescriptions.whisper-large-v2-sync: Separate engine (Faster-Whisper) that fixes subtitles which will not sync. Best for non-English (JA/KO/ZH); English is fine with large-v3-turbo. Follows device choice. ~4.5GB GPU, slow.
modelDescriptions.whisper-large-v2-sync-lite: Runs the same file in int8, lighter. ~3GB VRAM for low-end GPUs, no extra download. Sync quality nearly identical.

historyEmptyHintStatic: Process a file and it will appear here automatically
confirmDeleteModel:
Delete this model?
(You will need to re-download it to use again)
historySubtitleText: Recently processed files · keeps the latest 200
deviceStatusHtml:
GPU recommended: Much faster if NVIDIA GPU is available
CPU: Use when no GPU or memory is limited
translationEnabledHtml:
Recommended: MyMemory is free and stable
~50K chars/day free (approx.)
translationDeeplHtml:
DeepL: 500K chars/month free, API key required
High quality translation service
translationChatgptHtml:
GPT-5.4 mini: User API key required
Natural translation possible
deviceAuto: Auto (Use GPU if available, otherwise CPU)
trChatGPTNano: GPT-5.4 nano (Cheaper model, requires API key)
translationLocalHtml:
Local (Hy-MT2): Offline translation · no internet required
One-time ~1.1 GB download · GPU/CPU selectable
localModelMissingHtml: ⚠ Hy-MT2 model not installed (~1.1 GB) — auto-downloads on start
srtModeHint: 📄 SRT Translation Mode - Select translation method
mixedFileWarning: Video and SRT files are mixed. Each will be processed accordingly.
srtWillBeSkipped: SRT files will be skipped without translation. Please select a translation method.
allDoneWithTr: All files (extract+translate) completed! You may close the window.
apiKeyMissingFallback: API key missing — switched to “No translation”.
allFailed: ⚠️ All tasks failed — see the log above for the cause
allDoneWithErrors: Completed — some files failed (check output folder)
targetLangNote: Applied only when translation is enabled.
mymemoryInfoHtml:
MyMemory can be used for free without an API key.
Daily quota is roughly ~50K characters per IP (subject to change).

Usage Guide:
• Enter API keys and test immediately with "Test Connection"
• Or save keys first, then test saved keys
• Real-time testing supported without saving
deeplHelpHtml: Get a free key from DeepL API page. (500K chars/month free)
openaiHelpHtml:
Get OpenAI API Key
(GPT-5.4 mini, paid - $0.075 input / $0.60 output per 1M tokens)
geminiHelpHtml:
Google AI Studio
(Free: 250 subs/day ~20-30min, Paid: unlimited)
translationGeminiHtml:
Gemini: Google AI translation, free API key
Fast translation speed
historyToggleHint: When off, new files won’t be recorded. Existing history is preserved — use “Clear all” to securely remove it.
deviceSyncLockNote: Follows the device setting. Auto tries GPU first and falls back to CPU. CPU means CPU-only, so it is slow.
errorTranslationPassthrough: The translation engine failed on almost all lines (the local model may have crashed). Subtitles were not translated. Try again, switch the device to CPU, or pick another translation method.
allFailedLocal: ⚠️ All translations failed — the local model failed. Try again or switch the device to CPU
allFailedApi: ⚠️ All translations failed — check your API key or quota
